description_long: This figure depicts an adult pedestrian dressed in a casual yet slightly formal outfit, featuring a button-up shirt, a loose necktie, and knee-length shorts. The character's face is covered by a dramatic clown mask with exaggerated features, and their hair is styled into a tall, spiked mohawk. The back of the shirt is emblazoned with the bold text 'JOKER SQUAD' in red, adding a rebellious or themed element. The individual wears mismatched high-top sneakers and has visible knee pads, suggesting a streetwise or urban subculture influence. The overall appearance is striking and theatrical, blending elements of street fashion with costume-like accessories. The figure's posture is upright with arms extended horizontally, as if in a neutral or T-pose.
description: A costumed adult pedestrian with a clown mask, spiked mohawk, button-up shirt, necktie, shorts, and high-top sneakers, featuring 'JOKER SQUAD' text on the back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the clown mask, spiked mohawk, button-up shirt with necktie, shorts, and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the mask, mohawk, and the layered clothing, with visible knee pads.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the 'JOKER SQUAD' text on the shirt's back, the mohawk from behind, and the overall outfit.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mask's profile, mohawk, and the layered clothing with knee pads.
attribute_clothing_type: button-up shirt with necktie, knee-length shorts, and knee pads
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
